---
title: "Evidencia 1 | "
author: "Valeria Ramos Lara A00844070, IDM. Andres Rodriguez Cantu A01287002, ITC"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
bibliography: src/references.bib
csl: src/apa.csl
link-citations: true
knit: (function(input, encoding) rmarkdown::render(input, encoding = encoding, output_dir = "output", envir = new.env()))
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: journal
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
# Establece el wd al path en donde se esta knitteando el documento
# Si se corre esto mientras no se esta knitteando, aparecera un error.
rmd_path <- knitr::current_input()
if (nzchar(rmd_path)) {
  setwd(normalizePath(dirname(rmd_path)))
} else if (requireNamespace("rstudioapi", quietly = TRUE) && rstudioapi::isAvailable()) {
  setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
}
```


# Cargar df de datos 
```{r}
datosCalCOFI <- read.csv("data/raw/datosCalCOFI.csv")
```

# Include test.rmd test
```{r child='src/test.rmd'}
```

# Referencias
